name: RetroRead
description: A retro game-style reader for EPUB and TXT books on NextUI.
author: expkzb

changelog.v0.5.3: Added the new theme system with Mint LCD and GB Invert, improved menu selection visibility, and enabled right-direction paging in the reader.
changelog.v0.5.2: Fixed punctuation reveal edge cases, improved Chinese and quoted sentence splitting, and added handheld performance HUD/log tools.
changelog.v0.5.1: Fixed release packaging structure and refreshed project screenshots and support messaging.
changelog.v0.5.0: Introduced the RetroRead name, TXT support, voice styles, richer dialogue box themes, and a polished TrimUI Brick experience.
